channel.title: Nutritionix on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in Nutritionix on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: nutritionR: NLP nutrition analysis in R
item.description: I’m a bit of a nutrition nerd and I’ve been wanting to do some analysis of recipes that I cook a lot just because I’m curious about some of their properties. To get closer to that goal, I decided to write a package, nutritionR, that can perform a nutritional analysis of foods and recipes expressed in natural language. nutritionR does this by wrapping the Nutritionix API. It requires a free developer API key or above.
